---
name: New Template Request
about: Request support for a new template
labels: new-template
---

## Template Details
- **Category:** (e.g., web/backend, web/frontend, web/fullstack, minecraft/plugin, etc.)
- **Framework/Library:** (e.g., Express, React, Fastify, etc.)
- **Description:** (A brief description of the template and its intended use case)
- **Opinionated Choices:** (List any specific tools, libraries, or configurations that should be included in the template)
- **Additional Features:** (Optional - any extra features or configurations that would make this template more useful)
- **Example Use Cases:** (Optional - describe scenarios where this template would be particularly beneficial)
- **Related Issues/PRs:** (Optional - link to any related issues or pull requests that provide context for this request)
- **Your Name:** (Optional - if you want to be credited for the suggestion)
- **Contact Information:** (Optional - if you want to be contacted for further discussion about the template)
- **Priority Level:** (Optional - indicate how urgently you think this template should be added, e.g., low, medium, high)

## Justification
<!-- Why should this template be added? -->

## Additional Information
<!-- Any other information that might be helpful for understanding the request or implementing the template -->

## Additional Notes
